basic_details.job_title: TATR Chandrapur – Tourism Manager and Visual Designer – 3 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Tadoba-Andhari Tiger Reserve Chandrapur (TATR Chandrapur) has released a recruitment notification for 3 posts including Tourism Manager - 2 and Visual Designer - 1 for Graduate and Design degree holders, and candidates can apply offline till 09-06-2026 at mahaforest.gov.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate, Degree in Design from a recognized institution, Mastery in design tools like Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator), Figma or Sketch, Experience of working on a Govt. project

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for TATR Chandrapur Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
seo_tags: TATR Chandrapur Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Tourism Manager and Visual Designer Posts
